title: Mr. 3 Explains the Trick
description: On pages 9–12, mr. 3 explains the trick as the hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets.
scene: Mr. 3 Explains the Trick. The hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Psychological disturbances can often greatly influence the course of a battle, you see.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: With that explosive gift from an unseen enemy,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: They're now in a state of confusion.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: The first target,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: is DORRY THE BLUE OGRE.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: though I knew the attack wouldn't kill him,

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: The damage to his stomach is still severe...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We no longer need to worry about him.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Luckily for us, their little fight has begun again as well.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: It's best to think of this race of "Warriors" as mere boars.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: As long as we avoid a direct confrontation, they are of no real threat, you see.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As for these small time pirates who've learned the boss' secret...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Starting with the easiest to handle,

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Let us lure them out one by one to my "service set"...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: As my motto goes, "the greatest of crimes require cunning"...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Fufufufu... I have many ways to defeat my enemies without actually fighting!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Ah crap.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I'm lost.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: I feel like I've seen this tree before...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Was I supposed to take a left at the tree with ivy...?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Nami! Great timing!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: I didn't know which way our ship was so I was wondering what to do...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: By the way,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: What were you doing out here?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Hello?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Gyaa- AAA- AAA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a Dino- saur!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Dinoo-oooo- 000!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait up! You're running way too fast!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: pant pant

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Jeez, that usopp...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 3 explains the trick. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
